message:
feat(fwc/catalog): add config truth contract types and provenance builder (bead 29.2.1)

Foundational infrastructure for the config truth contract, establishing
how configuration operations are sourced, committed, and how their
staleness is communicated to operators and agents.

New types (all #[allow(dead_code)] — not yet wired into handlers):
- ConfigDataSource: enum covering HostCurrent, HostRevision, Cached,
  ManifestDefault, SchemaInferred, UserProvided, Unknown
- ConfigMutationOutcome: enum for Committed, DryRun, Rejected,
  RolledBack, Unknown
- ConfigOperationProvenance: struct carrying command, source, outcome,
  authoritative flag, and staleness caveat
- config_provenance(): builder function assembling provenance from
  source + command + outcome
- CONFIG_MUTATING_OPS / CONFIG_READABLE_OPS: canonical operation lists
- config_op_requires_host(): predicate for host-dependent operations
- expected_config_source(): maps command × live/offline to expected source

Tests (~230 lines):
- Serde round-trip and tag uniqueness for ConfigDataSource and
  ConfigMutationOutcome
- Authoritative vs offline mutual exclusion invariants
- config_provenance builder correctness
- expected_config_source: live returns host source, offline returns
  manifest/cached, non-config command returns None
- config_op_requires_host: mutating ops require host, readable ops
  don't (when offline-capable)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
